purpose: Defines repository-wide mojibake signature detection and report contract requirements.

criteria.pass_logic: Configured mojibake signatures are detected by tool and fixtures.
criteria.warn_logic: Detection works but signature coverage requires expansion.
criteria.block_logic: Required signature families are not detected.
criteria.remediation_path: Extend signature list and validate with fixture cases.

criteria.warn_logic: Only legacy files trigger the heuristic.
criteria.block_logic: New canonical mixed-encoding patterns pass undetected.
criteria.remediation_path: Tune mixed-pattern heuristic and add targeted tests.

criteria.pass_logic: Report contains path, line, hit_type, severity, owner_organ, and verdict.
criteria.warn_logic: Report exists but optional metadata is incomplete.
criteria.block_logic: Report contract fields are missing or malformed.
criteria.remediation_path: Restore report schema fields and rerun filter.

next_action: Keep signature table under script-first governance with fixture coverage.
